DP.124.0000:
Welcome!
I don’t get challenged very often!\f
The glory you are now beholding is
the Pastoria Gym Leader!\f
That’s right, I’m Crasher Wake!\f
My Pokémon were toughened up by
stormy white waters!\f
They’ll take everything you can throw
at them and then pull you under!\f
Victory will be ours!
Come on, let’s get it done!\f
DP.124.0001:
It seems the undertow pulled me
under...\f
But I had a great time battling
with you!\f
You’ve earned this!\f
DP.124.0002:
[0103,0000] received
the Fen Badge from Wake!
DP.124.0003:
You need that Fen Badge to use the
hidden move Defog outside of battle.\f
This is a special reward from me in
recognition of your team’s power.\f
DP.124.0004:
That [0108,0000] contains the
move [0106,0001].\f
It inflicts double the damage on
targets with less than half their\r
HP left.\f
Use it to end battles decisively!
DP.124.0005:
The styles of battling and winning
are as widely varied as Trainers are.\f
Do you want to know how I battle?
I battle so I can say I had fun at\r
the end, whether I win or lose!
DP.124.0006:
The Gym Leader Wake... Uh, I mean
Crasher Wake, is a master of\r
Water-type Pokémon.\f
I’d say you’ve got guts if you try
to face down Water types with Fire-\r
or Ground-type Pokémon!\f
But that part I’ll leave up to you!
Go and have some good battles!
DP.124.0007:
Oh! [0103,0000]!
You’ve beaten the Gym Leader!\f
So, how was it?\f
Did you enjoy your battle against
Wake... I mean Crasher Wake?\f
Sure, winning is important, but
don’t forget to have fun, too!\f
I think Wake... I mean Crasher Wake,
showed you what I mean by fun.
DP.124.0008:
Pastoria City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Crasher Wake\f
Certified Trainers:
[0103,0000]
